temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) A young boy with shaggy brown hair, wearing a striped sweater, stands in a dimly lit room. He holds a large, sharp kitchen knife with a red handle, examining it closely. The room is furnished with a bookshelf, a lamp on a side table, and framed pictures on the wall. The camera slowly pans left, revealing a vintage television set in the background. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a sense of unease and mystery, as a young boy is shown handling a large knife in a seemingly normal but ominous environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, creating a tense atmosphere.)
